ui_main_tip: Share your ID with a friend; the game will start automatically once connected.
ui_ready_status_waiting: Waiting for both players to click Start...
ui_orientation_warning: Please rotate your device to portrait mode to play.
log_overflow_full: [Action] {0}'s Overflow is full; gains 1 additional Action Point
log_hit_normal: [Hit] {0} performs a basic attack, hitting {1} for {2} damage (Armor mitigated: {3})
log_miss_skill: [Evade] The target shifts form, successfully evading the skill strike!
log_miss_area: [Evade] {0} is in a concealed state, evading the area damage from {1}
log_miss_me: [Evade] The skill was evaded by our side!
log_game_over_draw: Game Over: Both sides were eliminated simultaneously—it's a Draw!
log_purify_arrow_hit: [Skill Effect] {0} cleansed {1} status effects, dealing an additional {2} damage.
sys_local_scan: [Dev Mode Detection] Automatically traversing directory via local HTTP index: {0}
sys_online_scan: [Online Deployment Detection] Securely matching resource manifest via filelist.json: {0}
sys_scan_skip: [Scan Skipped] Directory does not exist or server denied directory listing access: {0}
sys_scan_skip_list: [Scan Skipped] Unable to read static manifest filelist.json.
sys_preload: Starting automatic scan and preloading of all game scripts...
sys_char_fail: Failed to automatically identify character cards; please ensure Live Server has directory browsing enabled:
sys_char_data_err: Character selection data is invalid; please select again.
sys_buff_load_fail: [Load Failed] Buff script not found: {0}. Please check if the file exists in the `buff/` folder and if the filename matches exactly.
sys_area_load_fail: [Load Failed] Area script not found: {0}. Please check the `area/` folder.
msg_security_err: Security Restriction! Please run this in a server environment (e.g., Vercel).
buff_slow_desc: Slow: Movement points remain at 0, and no Overflow points are gained at the start of the turn.
buff_poison_desc: Poison: Lose 1 HP per stack at the end of the turn.
buff_moveBoost_desc: Haste: Gain 1 additional Movement Point at the start of the turn.
buff_armorShred_desc: Armor Shred: Reduces Armor by 1 per stack.
skill_archer_s1_desc: Applies Slow to targets within range for {buffEffects.0.duration} rounds (does not stack).
skill_archer_s2_desc: Fires a Purifying Arrow, clearing all status effects from the target. Deals an additional {scripts.0.props.bonusPerBuff} damage for each effect cleared.
skill_archer_s3_desc: Deploys a {areaEffect.rangeArgs}x{areaEffect.rangeArgs} Arrow Rain zone for {areaEffect.duration} rounds, dealing {damage} damage.
area_arrowRain_desc: At the end of an enemy's turn, deals {areaEffect.damage} damage to targets within the Arrow Rain zone.
skill_swordsman_s1_desc: Deals {damage.0} damage to targets within range, {damage.1} times.
skill_swordsman_s2_desc: Dashes to a destination, dealing {damage} damage to enemies along the path (cannot pass through walls; can pass through water).
skill_swordsman_s3_desc: Deals {damage} damage; applies {buffEffects.0.stacks} stacks of Shattered Armor for {buffEffects.0.duration} rounds (Non-stackable).
skill_killer_s1_desc: Hurls a poisoned blade in a straight line, dealing {damage} damage to the first target hit; applies {buffEffects.0.stacks} stacks of Poison for {buffEffects.0.duration} rounds (Non-stackable).
skill_killer_s2_desc: Gains Concealment until the end of the next enemy turn.
